channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Orpheus Street SE5, opposite entrance to Post Office. Non-offensive tags on cabinet, 22nd April
item.description:
Please clear

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 23b, Denmark Hill, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly-tipping sofas, 22nd April
item.description:
Flat-tipping at 47-57 Victorian Grove, Stoke Newington

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Victorian Grove, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Block paving loose near traffic light controller, 22nd April
item.description:
Paving is loose, ladder work is unsafe.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Mandela Way, Old Kent Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: These tenants use the pavement outside their flats as personal space, chairs tables obstructing the pavement and using the corner as a dumping ground. School children and elderly and disabled people cannot use the pavement, 22nd April
item.description:
The public footpath is not for personal use, large crowds of people use it as if it is their back gardens and causing problems for local people to go round them using the road. This is not safe for children and people with mobility scooters who rely on the pavements being clear for them to pass. This is a daily occurrence and their is a non flat 12/3 with dumped rubbish at the end

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Liston Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Poor road surface in Madison Gardens, 22nd April
item.description:
Road has been deteriorating for years. There's multiple patches of missing tarmac all the way down the close. It needs resurfacing. Please put us on your to do list Thank you :)

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Madison Gardens, West Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Buggy, 22nd April
item.description:
Email received by CSC inbox 22/04/26 14:29 45 ravensbury rd(adj alley)dump buggy entrce/hvy litter throughout
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 45, Ravensbury Road, St Paul's Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Sewage floodin, 22nd April
item.description:
There is a sewage drain in the alleyway between houses between 69 and 71 - and its over flowing
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 71, Orchard Rise East, Falconwood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Trees in Kelsey Park overhanging garden, pieces falling in heavy winds, 22nd April
item.description:
There are several trees that are in Kelsey Park grounds that are now severely overhanging the gardens of 78 Wickham Road. When it’s windy bits fall down into the garden, and given the age of the occupants is difficult to remove and could be potentially dangerous, or may cause damage to the balconies and windows on that side of the block. This is an ongoing issue.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 82, Wickham Road, Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish, 22nd April
item.description:
Peoples leaving there bin bags on pavement and cars driving over it

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Plumstead Common Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Sign post rotting, 22nd April
item.description:
Dead End sign post badly rusting and an electric cable is attached to it

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Stamford Hill, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped rubbish / rats, 22nd April
item.description:
At the back of rymans where the flats are there is alot of dumped rubbish including food items which causes an awful smell and now have rats running around this has been on going over a year was all cleared when scope closed down but has now built back up and its building up near our fire exit from the back of our shop we have contacted our landlord / HR but it's not in our band

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 37 - 41, High Street, Widmore, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Sewage Chamber, 22nd April
item.description:
Sewage chamber spewing out sewage on common land between 69 and 71 Orchard Rise East Blackfen DA15 8RU.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 71, Orchard Rise East, Falconwood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Outside 27 Chalcot Road, 22nd April
item.description:
The lantern on the street light is wobbly and needs to be secured.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 40, Chalcot Road, Chalk Farm, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Red spary paint over yellow lines, 22nd April
item.description:
Red spray paint has been used to cover the original yellow lines on the road markings at the end of Napier Road.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 145, Masons Hill, Widmore, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti, 22nd April
item.description:
On the Black plastic litter bin in Church Hill Wood at the junction with Pverest Rd.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1, Amherst Drive, Poverest, Greater London

item.title: Graffiti, 22nd April
item.description:
. On the post box in Cray Valley Rd near the junction with Cray Ave
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cray Valley Road, Poverest, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: New Screw nails on road, 22nd April
item.description:
Screw nails On road. I had to change my tyre twice in a matter of two Months. Same tyre samde screw nail which is literally brand new and big enough to damage whole tyre resulting in me to get brand new tyre. I paid £220 in total damage due to roads not being cleared and a safety hazzard.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 172, Upper Wickham Lane, East Wickham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: The clothes recycling container at the junction of Cray Valley Rd & Oasthouse Way., 22nd April
item.description:
The clothes recycling container at the junction of Cray Valley Rd & Oasthouse Way.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cray Valley Road, Poverest, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Two broken bikes, 22nd April
item.description:
Right outside school where the kids queue. Not safe as they climb on the bike racks Please send someone

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Dumont Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 3 large dead animals on A20 - 1 deer and 2 badgers, 22nd April
item.description:
3 large dead animals - one some sort of deer and 2 badgers, close to metal middle barrier, one badger close to the actual road

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Sidcup By-pass, St Paul's Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
